[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m1[0m[34m of [0m[33m31[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000800[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.Obfuscation[0m
  Severity: [36mImportant[0m, Confidence: [36mHigh[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/lib/plugin.js[0m

[30;1m1412 | [0m[35mfunction toComment(sourceMap) {[0m
[30;1m1413 | [0m[35m	// eslint-disable-next-line no-undef[0m
[30;1m1414 | [0m[35m	var base64 = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(sourceMap))));[0m
[30;1m1415 | [0m[35m	var data = 'sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,' + base64;[0m

[30;1m1411 | [0m[35m// Adapted from convert-source-map (MIT)[0m
[30;1m1412 | [0m[35mfunction toComment(sourceMap) {[0m
[30;1m1413 | [0m[35m	// eslint-disable-next-line no-undef[0m
[30;1m1414 | [0m[35m	var base64 = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(sourceMap))));[0m
[30;1m1415 | [0m[35m	var data = 'sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,' + base64;[0m
[30;1m1416 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m1417 | [0m[35m	return '/*# ' + data + ' */';[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m28[0m[34m of [0m[33m31[0m[31m ]--[0m
